entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A significant food, cash, and oilseed crop in India affected by various diseases.

entities.name: PHYTOPLASMA
entities.description: A pathogen causing diseases in groundnut, whose incidence has been increasing and posing a threat to farming.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where a study on groundnut phytoplasmas was conducted across five districts.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where groundnut is a significant food, cash, and oilseed crop.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT PHYLLODY
entities.description: A disease caused by phytoplasma in groundnut, identified through symptoms and incidence.

entities.name: LITTLE LEAF
entities.description: A disease caused by phytoplasma in groundnut, identified through symptoms and incidence.

entities.name: WITCHES' BROOM
entities.description: A disease caused by phytoplasma in groundnut, identified through symptoms and incidence.

entities.name: ROVING SURVEY
entities.description: A method conducted across five districts in Andhra Pradesh to assess the incidence of phytoplasmas in groundnut cultivations.

entities.name: ANANTAPUR
entities.description: One of the five major groundnut growing districts in Andhra Pradesh where the roving survey was conducted.

entities.name: KADAPA
entities.description: One of the five major groundnut growing districts in Andhra Pradesh where the roving survey was conducted.

entities.name: KURNOOL

entities.name: SRI SATYA SAI
entities.description: One of the five major groundnut growing districts in Andhra Pradesh where the roving survey was conducted.

entities.name: TIRUPATI
entities.description: One of the five major groundnut growing districts in Andhra Pradesh where the roving survey was conducted.

entities.name: KHARIF SEASON
entities.description: The agricultural season in 2023 during which the roving survey was conducted.

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS
entities.description: A groundnut disease that shares similar symptoms with phytoplasma-associated diseases.

entities.name: PEANUT STEM NECROSIS
entities.description: A groundnut disease that shares similar symptoms with phytoplasma-associated diseases.

entities.name: PEANUT CLUMP DISEASE
entities.description: A groundnut disease that shares similar symptoms with phytoplasma-associated diseases.

entities.name: PEANUT STUNT DISEASE
entities.description: A groundnut disease that shares similar symptoms with phytoplasma-associated diseases.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of groundnut, which is lowered by fungal, bacterial, and viral diseases.
